requirement_topic.en: OCPP Interoperability and Back-Office Communication for Ecuador EV Charging Networks
requirement_topic.zh: OCPP互操作与厄瓜多尔电动汽车充电网络后台通信
requirement_topic.zht: OCPP互操作與厄瓜多電動汽車充電網絡後台通訊

summary.en: Ecuador does not have a state-mandated EV charging management platform equivalent to Qatar's Tarsheed or China's national charging-operation standards as of 2026-06-14. However, private charge-point operators (CPOs) and network operators deploying in Ecuador have generally adopted OCPP (Open Charge Point Protocol) as the de facto back-office communication standard for networked chargers, consistent with the IEC 62196 / CCS2 connector ecosystem adopted by the private sector. Networked AC and DC chargers intended for CPO-managed public or semi-public deployment should support OCPP 1.6J or OCPP 2.0.1 as required by the specific network operator or project specification. OCPP back-office capability is not mandated by a published Ecuadorian regulation as of 2026-06-14 but is a practical deployment requirement for CPO-managed infrastructure. EMC requirements follow IEC 61000 series standards applicable under INEN's conformity framework. Smart-metering and energy-data reporting obligations may apply under ARCERNNR / ARCONEL regulations for grid-connected installations.
summary.zh: 截至2026年6月14日，厄瓜多尔没有类似卡塔尔Tarsheed或中国国家充电运营标准那样的国家强制电动汽车充电管理平台。然而，在厄瓜多尔部署的私营充电点运营商（CPO）和网络运营商普遍采用OCPP（开放充电点协议）作为联网充电桩的事实后台通信标准，与私营部门采用的IEC 62196 / CCS2接口生态系统保持一致。面向CPO管理的公共或半公共部署的联网交流和直流充电桩，应按具体网络运营商或项目规范的要求支持OCPP 1.6J或OCPP 2.0.1。截至2026年6月14日，厄瓜多尔尚无已发布的法规强制要求OCPP后台能力，但其为CPO管理基础设施的实际部署要求。EMC要求遵循INEN合格评定框架下适用的IEC 61000系列标准。智能计量和能源数据报告义务可能依据ARCERNNR / ARCONEL法规适用于并网安装。
summary.zht: 截至2026年6月14日，厄瓜多沒有類似卡塔爾Tarsheed或中國國家充電運營標準那樣的國家強制電動汽車充電管理平台。然而，在厄瓜多部署的私營充電點運營商（CPO）和網絡運營商普遍採用OCPP（開放充電點協議）作為聯網充電樁的事實後台通訊標準，與私營部門採用的IEC 62196 / CCS2接口生態系統保持一致。面向CPO管理的公共或半公共部署的聯網交流和直流充電樁，應按具體網絡運營商或項目規範的要求支持OCPP 1.6J或OCPP 2.0.1。截至2026年6月14日，厄瓜多尚無已發布的法規強制要求OCPP後台能力，但其為CPO管理基礎設施的實際部署要求。EMC要求遵循INEN合格評定框架下適用的IEC 61000系列標準。智能計量和能源數據報告義務可能依據ARCERNNR / ARCONEL法規適用於併網安裝。

standards_or_laws: OCPP (Open Charge Point Protocol) 1.6J and 2.0.1 — back-office communication for networked chargers (de facto standard for Ecuador CPOs)
IEC 61000 series — electromagnetic compatibility (EMC) requirements under INEN conformity framework
IEC 63584 — Standard for OCPP adoption in EV charging (international context)
ARCERNNR-002/20 / ARCONEL — smart-metering and energy-reporting obligations for grid-connected installations
IEC 61851-24 — Digital communication between a DC EV charging station and an EV for control of DC charging (CCS2 context)

summary.en: China DC fast chargers use GB/T 27930-2023 for communication between the off-board charger and the battery management system — a CAN-bus protocol that is not interoperable with OCPP back-office systems or with the CCS2 / IEC 61851-24 communication stack. China AC chargers may implement OCPP-based or proprietary back-office protocols depending on the operator, but the underlying connector and signaling stack uses CC/CP (not the PP/CP signaling of IEC 62196 Type 2). China's national charging-operation management standards (e.g. NB/T 33015) are domestically applicable and are not an OCPP or Ecuador CPO requirement substitute.
summary.zh: 中国直流快充采用GB/T 27930-2023进行非车载充电机与电池管理系统之间的通信，这是一种CAN总线协议，与OCPP后台系统或CCS2 / IEC 61851-24通信栈不兼容。中国交流充电桩根据运营商情况可能采用基于OCPP或私有的后台协议，但底层接口和信号栈使用CC/CP（而非IEC 62196 Type 2所用的PP/CP信号）。中国国家充电运营管理标准（如NB/T 33015）仅适用于国内，不能替代OCPP或厄瓜多尔CPO要求。
summary.zht: 中國直流快充採用GB/T 27930-2023進行非車載充電機與電池管理系統之間的通訊，這是一種CAN總線協議，與OCPP後台系統或CCS2 / IEC 61851-24通訊棧不兼容。中國交流充電樁根據運營商情況可能採用基於OCPP或私有的後台協議，但底層接口和信號棧使用CC/CP（而非IEC 62196 Type 2所用的PP/CP信號）。中國國家充電運營管理標準（如NB/T 33015）僅適用於國內，不能替代OCPP或厄瓜多CPO要求。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 27930-2023 — Communication protocols between off-board conductive charger and battery management system
NB/T 33015 — Operation management requirements for electric vehicle AC charging spots (China domestic)

gap.en: Exporters must confirm: (1) the charger firmware supports the OCPP version required by the intended Ecuador CPO or project specification (typically OCPP 1.6J or 2.0.1); (2) GB/T 27930 DC communication is replaced with the IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118 stack for any CCS2 DC station; (3) remote monitoring, fault-reporting, and access-control functions meet the CPO's back-office platform requirements; (4) the charger's EMC emissions comply with IEC 61000 series limits under the INEN conformity framework; (5) smart-metering and data-reporting requirements from ARCERNNR / ARCONEL for grid-connected installations are confirmed and met. A charger with only GB/T 27930 DC communication and no OCPP implementation cannot integrate with Ecuador's private CPO networks.
gap.zh: 出口商须确认：(1) 充电桩固件支持目标厄瓜多尔CPO或项目规范所要求的OCPP版本（通常为OCPP 1.6J或2.0.1）；(2) 任何CCS2直流充电站须将GB/T 27930直流通信替换为IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118通信栈；(3) 远程监控、故障报告和访问控制功能须满足CPO后台平台要求；(4) 充电桩EMC辐射符合INEN合格评定框架下的IEC 61000系列限值；(5) 已确认并满足ARCERNNR / ARCONEL对并网安装的智能计量和数据报告要求。仅支持GB/T 27930直流通信且无OCPP实现的充电桩无法与厄瓜多尔私营CPO网络集成。
gap.zht: 出口商須確認：(1) 充電樁固件支持目標厄瓜多CPO或項目規範所要求的OCPP版本（通常為OCPP 1.6J或2.0.1）；(2) 任何CCS2直流充電站須將GB/T 27930直流通訊替換為IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118通訊棧；(3) 遠程監控、故障報告和訪問控制功能須滿足CPO後台平台要求；(4) 充電樁EMC輻射符合INEN合格評定框架下的IEC 61000系列限值；(5) 已確認並滿足ARCERNNR / ARCONEL對併網安裝的智能計量和數據報告要求。僅支持GB/T 27930直流通訊且無OCPP實現的充電樁無法與厄瓜多私營CPO網絡集成。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — OCPP is a de facto CPO network requirement in Ecuador, not yet a published mandatory regulation as of 2026-06-14; confirm the OCPP version and back-office requirements with the specific project or CPO; EMC compliance under INEN / IEC 61000 is required for product conformity
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 27930 is mandatory for China domestic DC charging communication; it is not OCPP-compatible and cannot substitute for Ecuador CPO back-office integration

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] OCPP back-office integration is a practical deployment requirement for networked chargers in Ecuador's private CPO market, and GB/T 27930 DC communication is incompatible with IEC 61851-24 / CCS2 stacks. Confirm the required OCPP version, smart-metering obligations, and EMC compliance before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] OCPP后台集成是厄瓜多尔私营CPO市场联网充电桩的实际部署要求，GB/T 27930直流通信与IEC 61851-24 / CCS2通信栈不兼容。出货前须确认所需OCPP版本、智能计量义务和EMC合规性。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] OCPP後台集成是厄瓜多私營CPO市場聯網充電樁的實際部署要求，GB/T 27930直流通訊與IEC 61851-24 / CCS2通訊棧不兼容。出貨前須確認所需OCPP版本、智能計量義務和EMC合規性。
